title: PDF Viewer unified page width (dbg75)
description:
PipeSync PDF Viewer now normalizes every page in a stack to the same layout width before fit/zoom. Crop-trimmed pages no longer keep stale per-page widths that made later pages render smaller than page 1. Native dimensions and crop insets scale together so PDF media still fills each unified box.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg75). Open PDF Viewer on plans that previously showed page 1 large and pages 2–3 smaller — all pages should share the same horizontal scale.
changeLog: planBoardNormalizeViewerWorkspaceLayout: unify pass sets all pages to maxW.
Crop pages use piece intrinsic w/h baseline before unify, not stale p.w.
planBoardScaleViewerPageDims scales natW/natH and crop insets with layout.
Fit/reflow sync planBoardSyncPageDomBox after layout normalize.
H9 ingest: pageWs before/after unify, unifyW, per-page scales.
Keeps dbg74 column viewport fit and overflow clamp.
